codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements: deterministic seeded fault injection, all three fault types with expected progression semantics, support for concurrent active faults, and clear_all/get_active_faults behavior validated by targeted tests.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and relevant shared-state docs for feature chaos-engine. No high-confidence correctness issues found; behavior and test coverage align with the feature description and expectedBehavior.
